overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval harbor town. The character moves from a dock area through cobblestone streets lined with half-timbered buildings, past docked sailing ships, through a guard checkpoint, and across a wooden bridge over a canal.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock transitioning to harbor street

events.description: character ascends wooden stairs from dock level to street level
character turns left onto the main cobblestone harbor street

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks from a small boat up wooden stairs to the harbor street level, turning left onto the main thoroughfare

notable_agents.action: shirtless dock worker walking along the street in the same direction

entered.detail: wooden boat with cream-colored sail that the character starts on
rough stone wall with wooden cap along the dock edge
traditional medieval European buildings with exposed timber framing
weathered wooden stairs leading from water level to street

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a small wooden boat with a cream sail docked at the harbor. Geralt walks along the dock and ascends stairs to street level, turning left onto a cobblestone street lined with traditional half-timbered medieval buildings. The environment transitions from the enclosed dock area to the open harbor street.

scene_state.functional_zone: open harbor promenade with docked merchant ships

events.description: large red and black sailing ship with multiple masts comes into full view at the dock
character approaches group of guards in red armor standing near cargo

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily along the cobblestone harbor street passing dock workers and stacks of cargo

notable_agents.action: shirtless dock worker walking in same direction as Geralt
group of three city guards in red armor and helmets standing near cargo

entered.detail: tall merchant ship with multiple masts, cream sails, and red hull docked at harbor
stacks of wooden barrels and burlap sacks along the waterfront
construction scaffolding made of rough timber near the dock

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open harbor promenade, Geralt passes a large sailing ship docked at the pier on the left. The street is lined with cargo barrels and scaffolding on the right. The character approaches a group of guards in red armor standing near the cargo as dock workers move about the area.

scene_state.functional_zone: guard checkpoint with market stall and upper harbor access

events.description: character ascends wooden stairs past guards in red armor carrying halberds
passes market stall with orange awning and enters narrower elevated street

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks up wooden stairs past a guard checkpoint and continues through a market area with vendors

notable_agents.action: guard in red armor with halberd standing at post on the stairs
vendor standing at wooden market stall with orange fabric awning

entered.detail: steep wooden stairs leading up to the upper harbor level
wooden guard structure with red-armored soldiers holding halberds
wooden market stall with orange fabric awning displaying produce
large stone building with arched windows and red tiled roof

segments.scene_description: Geralt ascends wooden stairs past a guard checkpoint where soldiers in red armor stand watch with halberds. At the top of the stairs, the character passes a market stall with an orange awning where a vendor stands. The scene transitions to an elevated street with a large stone church visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden bridge over canal with waterfront buildings

events.description: character steps onto wooden bridge crossing over the canal waterway
character pauses briefly to look at the canal water and distant tower before continuing

agents.ego_description: Geralt crosses a wooden bridge over the canal, pausing briefly to observe the water and surrounding architecture

entered.detail: cobblestone bridge with wooden railings spanning the canal
calm waterway reflecting the buildings between wooden docks
rope and wood suspension bridge connecting buildings across the canal

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Geralt crossing a wooden bridge over a calm canal. The stone church recedes into the left background while rope bridges and half-timbered buildings line the opposite bank. The character pauses briefly to look at the water and a distant tower before continuing across the bridge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the enclosed confines of a harbor dock into the bustling activity of a medieval harbor street. It begins on a small wooden boat with a cream sail, following Geralt as he walks along the dock and ascends stairs to street level. As he turns left, the environment transitions from the waterfront to a cobblestone street lined with traditional half-timbered buildings. The scene then opens onto a wide harbor promenade, passing a large sailing ship docked at the pier while cargo barrels and scaffolding line the right side of the path. Finally, the camera moves toward a group of guards in red armor and active dock workers, fully immersing the viewer in the lively atmosphere of the port.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a guarded checkpoint up toward an elevated street and across a scenic canal bridge. It begins as Geralt ascends wooden stairs past soldiers in red armor holding halberds, moving upward toward a market stall with a bright orange awning. As the character reaches the top, the scene opens onto a high street where a large stone church looms on the left. The camera then follows him onto a wooden bridge over a calm canal, with the church receding into the background as rope bridges and half-timbered buildings emerge along the opposite bank. Finally, the movement pauses briefly to overlook the water and a distant tower before continuing across the bridge.
